description_long: This is a rectangular, upright juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' and 'Premium Grape Juice' on the front, with a vivid image of a bunch of red grapes and green leaves. The carton is predominantly white with gold accents, including a gold top and side panels, and features a white screw cap at the top for pouring. The side of the carton displays the brand name 'FARAGELLO' vertically in large gold letters, along with additional product information. The back of the carton contains a detailed nutritional information panel and text in multiple languages. The packaging is made of laminated paperboard, likely with a thin plastic lining for liquid containment, and is designed to be both lightweight and sturdy. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, suitable for display in urban retail environments or for casual outdoor consumption.
description: A white and gold rectangular juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' with a grape cluster illustration and a white screw cap. The packaging is sleek, modern, and features detailed branding and nutritional information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' label, grape illustration, and the white screw cap on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical 'FARAGELLO' branding and gold side panel, with the cap visible at an angle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the nutritional information panel and multilingual product details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the 'FARAGELLO' branding and partial view of the front label and cap.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: red grape cluster with green leaves
